{{Quote|Look at them. Indulging themselves off the sweat of the common people. Fraternizing with aliens. All of this will soon change.|Colonel Raibat during the [[Unification Gala]]|<ref name="Tapani Sector Instant Adventures">{{WEGCite|story=The Event of the Season|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}}</ref>}}
'''[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Raibat''' was a knight of [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] and an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] officer. He was described by many as a thick-necked bull of a man and was a strong supporter of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He was a guest at the [[Unification Gala]] held prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and hosted by Lady [[Peta Lactril]] of [[House Barnaba]]. He considered the pomp and ceremony of the Gala to be unnecessary extravagance.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Event of the Season|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
